發現原來黨鐵係墨爾本 倫敦同斯特哥爾摩都有operation

既然黨鐵已經成為恐怖份子既一份子
大家要將件事升級做國防層面
無理由比佢地威脅其他地區架
大家可以一齊用以下template一齊去同當地政府部門反映下
(巴絲英文麻麻,大家可以自行刪減)

Tamplate for 瑞典:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Title: Serious Issue of Sweden National Securities

Dear sir/madam,

I am a citizen from Hong Kong. I would like to bring to your attention the misconduct of Hong Kong MTR, which may threat the transport safety in Sweden, with the fact that the railway system in Stockholm is operated by Hong Kong MTR. The Hong Kong MTR is held by the Hong Kong government by 75.2% and they have shown disregard for the safety and privacy of passengers over the influence of Hong Kong government and the Chinese Communist Party.

1. Privacy Issue in Railway system in Sweden
In recent months, the Hong Kong MTR installed more and more CCTVs, which were produced by China with connection to the central database system directly controlled by the China Authority, with the function of Human Face Identification System (HFIS). The China Authority will make use of the data gathered from HFIS to assess and control human behaviour. With a view of the General Data Protection Regulation (executed by EU) effective in 2018, there are serious potential threats existing in operation of Railway in Stockholm.

2. National Terrorist Attack in Hong Kong MTR
As on 31/08/2019, a terrorist attack was planned and executed by Hong Kong Police Force (HKPF) in Prince Edward Station (one of Railway stations in Hong Kong). The HKPF attacked innocent citizens and passengers in the station during a claimed arrest. The HKPF also DID NOT allow the Press to record the situation in the station; and NO one can know what’s happened in the station.

The MTR staff and HKPF DID NOT allow the First-aiders to save and rescue those innocent citizens who were beaten up; And there were lots of first-aiders and ambulance staff COULD NOT enter the Prince Edward Station; it obviously violates International Humanitarian Law (IHL). The safety of passengers in Melbourne railway are in doubt.

In this viewpoint, it is a possible gap for the China Authority to control the railway system in Stockholm by familiarising with the railway’s internal operation.

I believe that the aforementioned issues cannot be ignored and it is suggested that the Sweden Government might take all possible actions to protect the interest of Sweden people as soon as possible, including immediate review on the cooperation relationship with Hong Kong MTR.

Many thanks for your attention.

Best Regards,
A normal Hong Kong citizen
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
瑞典 Contact:
1. 瑞典首相 - Stefan Löfven
sb.registrator@regeringskansliet.se
2. 瑞典國防首長 - Peter Hultqvist

nordisk-rad@norden.org

Title: Serious Issue of UK National Securities

Dear sir/madam,

I am a citizen from Hong Kong. I would like to bring to your attention the misconduct of Hong Kong MTR, which may threat the transport safety in United Kindem, with the fact that the railway system in London is operated by Hong Kong MTR. The China Authority will make use of the data gathered from HFIS to assess and control human behaviour. The HKPF also DID NOT allow the Press to record the situation in the station; and NO one can know what’s happened in the station.

The MTR staff and HKPF DID NOT allow the First-aiders to save and rescue those innocent citizens who were beaten up; And there were lots of first-aiders and ambulance staff COULD NOT enter the Prince Edward Station; it obviously violates International Humanitarian Law (IHL). Serious Issue of Australia National Securities

Dear sir/madam,

I would like to bring to your attention the misconduct of Hong Kong MTR, which may threat the transport safety in Australia, with the fact that the railway system in Melbourne (i.e. Melbourne’s Metropolitan Rail Service) is operated by Hong Kong MTR. The Hong Kong MTR is held by the Hong Kong government by 75.2% and they have shown disregard for the safety and privacy of passengers over the influence of Hong Kong government and the Chinese Communist Party.

1. Privacy Issue in Railway system in Melbourne
In recent months, the Hong Kong MTR installed more and more CCTVs, which were produced by China with connection to the central database system directly controlled by the China Authority, with the function of Human Face Identification System (HFIS). The China Authority will make use of the data gathered from HFIS to assess and control human behaviour. With a view of the General Data Protection Regulation (executed by EU) effective in 2018, there are serious potential threats existing in operation of Railway in Melbourne.

2. National Terrorist Attack in Hong Kong MTR
As on 31/08/2019, a terrorist attack was planned and executed by Hong Kong Police Force (HKPF) in Prince Edward Station (one of Railway stations in Hong Kong). The HKPF attacked innocent citizens and passengers in the station during a claimed arrest. The HKPF also DID NOT allow the Press to record the situation in the station; and NO one can know what’s happened in the station.

The MTR staff and HKPF DID NOT allow the First-aiders to save and rescue those innocent citizens who were beaten up; And there were lots of first-aiders and ambulance staff COULD NOT enter the Prince Edward Station; it obviously violates International Humanitarian Law (IHL). The safety of passengers in Melbourne railway are in doubt.

In this viewpoint, it is a possible gap for the China Authority to control the railway system in Melbourne by familiarising with the railway’s internal operation.

I believe that the aforementioned issues cannot be ignored and it is suggested that the Australia Government should take all possible actions to protect the interest of Australia people as soon as possible, including immediate review on the cooperation relationship with Hong Kong MTR.

Many thanks for your attention.

Best Regards,
A Hong Kong citizen
